title: Social enterprise: market trends 2023
body: "The Department for Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS) produced this report looking at the size and characteristics of the social enterprise sector based on the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) 2023 Small Business Survey.  It examines the sector and identifies its scale in the UK, utilising a broad DCMS definition which includes both social enterprises within the voluntary and community sector and social enterprises operating as mission-led or purposeful businesses with private sector legal forms.  Previous reports on Social enterprise market trends have been published for:    Social enterprise: market trends (2012)   Social enterprise: market trends 2014   Social enterprise: market trends 2017   Social enterprise: market trends 2019   Social enterprise: market trends 2021   "
